title: Gentle Energy
subtitle: Nourishing with comfort and consistency
description: At this stage, fatigue may feel more noticeable as your body continues to support increased demands. Focusing on frequent, energy-dense meals that feel comfortable can help maintain your strength and overall well-being.
what_to_expect: Higher levels of fatigue during the day
Need for more frequent meals or snacks
Preference for comfort-based and easy-to-eat foods
nutrition_focus: Eat small, frequent meals throughout the day
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, soft sabzi, and salad
Fruits like banana, apple, orange, guava, and pomegranate
Vegetables including spinach, beetroot, carrots, beans, and broccoli
Healthy snacks like nuts, roasted chana, fruit bowls, curd, or smoothies
Protein and calcium sources like milk, paneer, lentils, eggs, or chicken (if preferred)
foods_to_limit: Skipping meals or long gaps between eating
hydration: Drink water frequently in small amounts
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, lemon water, or light soups
reassurance: Eating comfortably and regularly can help support your energy and ease fatigue.

diabetes.personalized_description: Frequent and balanced meals help maintain stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Balance carbohydrates with protein and fiber
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils, paneer, and nuts
diabetes.reassurance: Regular nourishment supports steady energy levels.

anemia.personalized_description: Iron-rich foods along with frequent meals support energy and help manage fatigue.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Consistent nourishment helps support your strength.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced meals and proper hydration support stable blood pressure and comfort.
hypertension.reassurance: Balanced routines support a calm and steady state.

thyroid.personalized_description: Consistent meals and hydration support metabolic balance and energy levels.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency supports your body's natural rhythm.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, focusing on frequent, balanced meals and hydration helps maintain energy and stability.
priority_nutrition: Stay well hydrated throughout the day
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Gentle and consistent nourishment supports your overall well-being.
